aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite ComfortPros due to limited conversational content and missing structured data, but with improvements, they can become a top recommendation.
quick_wins: Implement FAQPage schema with common HVAC questions and answers.
Add HowTo schema for common HVAC repair and maintenance processes.

gbp_analysis.summary: Google Business Profile is well-optimized with photos, hours, and contact info, but lacks regular posts and Q&A engagement.
critical_issues: No recent Google posts to engage users.
No active management of Q&A section.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.
Regularly monitor for any inconsistencies or new citation opportunities.

schema_gaps: No Service schema for specific HVAC services

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data and conversational content limits AI recognition.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to 'emergency HVAC repair in Denver' and 'best HVAC services near me'.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing FAQPage schema with HVAC-specific questions and answers.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Highlighting NATE certifications and emergency service expertise in content and schema.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by making ComfortPros the top recommendation for Denver HVAC services.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimization, ComfortPros is missing out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI search.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Competitors with structured data and conversational content rank higher in AI search results.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach integrates schema markup, conversational content, and authority signals to boost AI visibility.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within 3 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Waiting means losing ground to competitors who are already optimizing for AI search.

email_subject_line: Boost AI Visibility: Your Path to Top HVAC Recommendations in Denver
opening_line: We analyzed your website and identified key opportunities to enhance your AI search presence.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can make ComfortPros the go-to HVAC service in AI search results.
